03 //

Learning Journey

August 2024 · Cisco Networking Academy
Introduction to Packet Tracer
Launched the networking journey by mastering Cisco Packet Tracer — the industry-standard simulation environment. Built virtual topologies, configured routers and switches, and developed hands-on troubleshooting skills without touching real hardware.
May 2025 · Cisco Networking Academy
Data Analytics Essentials
Built data literacy across the full analytics pipeline — collecting, cleaning, analyzing, and visualizing data. Covered SQL fundamentals, statistical reasoning, and storytelling with data using industry tools.
June 2025 · Batangas State University
CCNA: Switching, Routing & Wireless Essentials
Deepened Layer 2 & 3 expertise — designing VLAN architectures, implementing Spanning Tree Protocol, configuring EIGRP, and managing wireless LANs with enterprise-grade access points.
February 2026 · Batangas State University
CCNA: Enterprise Networking, Security & Automation
Completed the flagship CCNA module — mastering OSPF, BGP, QoS policies, ACL-based security, VPN tunneling, and modern network programmability including SD-WAN, REST APIs, and infrastructure automation.
